input.message: Cancel my plan and send back the annual fee I paid yesterday.

why_it_matters: Refund phrasing may not include the literal word refund.

input.message: My password reset worked, but now the site says my profile is suspended and I cannot enter.

why_it_matters: Suspension/access language should route to account access.

input.message: The app is broken, my invoice looks wrong, and nobody can sign in.

why_it_matters: Multiple conflicting issues should not be forced into one route.
